message:
fix(test): set initialReplicas to 1 to match pod count assertion

Address Copilot review: the test expects HaveLen(1) but initialReplicas
was set to 2. Changed to 1 for consistency.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1366,7 +1366,7 @@ var _ = Describe("Test accelerator-based VA grouping isolation", Ordered, func()
 		h100ServiceMonName = h100Name + "-servicemonitor"
 
 		loadRate = 5
-		initialReplicas = 2
+		initialReplicas = 1
 		a100VariantCost = 10.0
 		h100VariantCost = 15.0
